evidence: GitHub PR API base/head coordinates matched the immutable clean checkout.
Git-blob behavior digest and canonical classification SHA were independently recomputed.
Exact Gate Policy passed tier 3 gate-change with zero product paths.
Thirty-two clean-head tests passed, including all three commit lanes.
The process-group watchdog killed a hung launcher descendant, returned captured output within five seconds, and left no live child PID.
Frozen branch protection preceded bounded and rollback paths.
Legacy execution required the explicit rollback environment variable.
E2E matrix, diff check, and App ruleset checks passed.
